text: Collagreens is an advanced collagen blend built with 6 active complexes that combines marine collagen peptides with daily supergreens to supplement gut health, skin, hair, and overall wellness. It uses natural synchronisation of studied and tested ingredients to enhance collagen supplementation in your body.

Collagreens is the world's only collagen supplement combined with supergreens to naturally support collagen synthesis. It is clean, tested, and functional. Collagreens also stands out as the best-tasting collagen blend on the market, using only natural flavours with no artificial or nature-identical flavours.
Yes, Collagreens is made with 100% all-natural ingredients. It contains zero artificial sweeteners, no harmful preservatives, and no unnecessary additives or chemicals.
No, Collagreens does not contain any artificial sweeteners. It is lightly sweetened with stevia, a natural, low-calorie sweetener with GRAS status from the USFDA.
Collagreens is lightly sweetened with stevia, a natural, low-calorie sweetener that has GRAS (Generally Recognised As Safe) status from the USFDA and is supported by numerous clinical studies.

Collagreens uses hydrolyzed marine collagen peptides sourced from marine fish for superior absorption. Marine collagen peptides are smaller in molecular size than other collagen types, making them highly bioavailable, meaning more collagen reaches your bloodstream and target tissues.
Each Collagreens sachet contains 8 grams of hydrolysed marine collagen peptides, providing a clinically relevant dose for effective collagen supplementation.

Collagreens contains 14 nutrient-rich supergreens that are often missing from daily diets: moringa, alfalfa, amaranth, amla, barley, spinach, oat grass, spirulina, chlorella, coriander, fenugreek, curcumin, ginger, and beetroot. These greens help cover daily nutrient gaps and naturally support collagen synthesis in the body.
Yes, Collagreens contains natural fruits including blueberry, pomegranate, apple, and pineapple. These fruits contribute to the pleasant taste and provide natural antioxidants.

Collagreens is a food supplement, not a medicine. It does not cure, treat, or mitigate any disease. It is designed to support your skin, hair, nail, gut, and overall nutritional health as part of a healthy lifestyle.

Yes, Collagreens is designed to be enjoyable and is considered the best-tasting collagen blend on the market. It uses natural mango powder, orange, and fruit ingredients to provide a great flavour without any artificial sweeteners.
Collagreens does not smell bad. It is formulated with natural mango powder, orange, and fruit ingredients to provide a pleasant aroma and taste experience.
Collagreens sachets are travel-friendly and easy to carry. Each sachet is individually packed, making it convenient to carry while travelling or on the go.

Collagreens does not fully replace greens in your diet, but it helps supplement missing nutrients from supergreens. It covers daily nutrient gaps and naturally supports collagen synthesis through its 14 nutrient-rich supergreens.
collagen is a protein. Collagreens provides hydrolysed marine collagen peptides, which are a high-quality source of protein that supports skin, hair, nails, and overall wellness.
Collagreens fits perfectly into a healthy lifestyle. It supports daily nutrition, complements your diet, and can be taken with other vitamins and supplements as part of a balanced wellness routine.

Collagreens is better than regular collagen supplements because it combines marine collagen with supergreens, fruits, and 36 bioactive ingredients. It is also better than tablets because it is a powder that absorbs faster, tastes great, and covers multiple wellness needs in one sachet.

One sachet of Collagreens effectively replaces up to 15 other supplements due to its 36 bioactive ingredients across 6 active complexes. Every ingredient is sourced at the highest quality and tested for purity, potency, and safety. This makes Collagreens an exceptional value-for-money complete wellness formula.

Yes, Collagreens is non-vegetarian. The collagen is sourced from marine fishes and the formula also uses chondroitin sulphate which is sourced from chicken sternum. A vegan version is in development to replace these animal-derived ingredients.
Collagreens is safe for daily long-term use. Only one sachet per day is recommended as the optimal daily dosage for effective results.

Collagreens is ideal for anyone looking to improve their skin, hair, nails, gut health, and overall nutrition. It is especially recommended for individuals who are low on energy or need help with gut metabolism, skin health, and hair health.
Collagreens is suitable for men. It is designed for both men and women who want to improve their skin, hair, nails, gut health, and overall nutrition.
Collagreens is suitable for women. It is designed for both men and women who want to improve their skin, hair, nails, gut health, and overall nutrition.
Collagreens is especially recommended for individuals aged 20 to 25 and above, as this is when natural collagen production begins to decline.
No, Collagreens is not vegetarian. The collagen is derived from marine fish and the formula also contains chondroitin sulphate sourced from chicken sternum.
No, Collagreens is not vegan. The collagen is derived from marine fish and the formula also contains chondroitin sulphate sourced from chicken sternum. A vegan version is in development.

Yes, Collagreens is keto-friendly. It contains no harmful preservatives or artificial additives, making it compatible with most dietary lifestyles including ketogenic diets.
Yes, Collagreens can be taken daily. It is designed for daily consumption with one sachet per day as the recommended dosage for optimal results.
Yes, Collagreens is very easy to prepare. Just mix one sachet into a glass of normal or cold water and consume daily. It takes only a few moments to prepare.
No, Collagreens does not replace meals. It supports your diet by supplementing nutrients that are often missing, especially collagen and supergreens, but it is not a meal replacement.
Yes, Collagreens is safe for beginners. It is beginner-friendly, light on the gut, and does not require a prescription. It is designed to be easy to incorporate into any daily routine.
No, Collagreens does not require a prescription. It is a food supplement that is safe for over-the-counter use and can be purchased directly without any medical prescription.
No, Collagreens does not feel heavy. It is light on your gut and designed to be gentle on digestion, making it comfortable for daily consumption even for those with sensitive stomachs.
To use Collagreens, mix one sachet into a glass of normal or cold water and consume daily. It can be taken at any time of the day including morning, before or after gym, or at night.

Collagreens can be taken at any time of the day as consistency matters more than timing. It is best consumed on an empty stomach in the morning. If you miss your morning dose, take it at least 2 hours after any meal.
It is best to consume Collagreens on an empty stomach in the morning for optimal absorption. In case you miss taking it early morning, consume it at least 2 hours after any meal.

Most users begin to see noticeable results within 4 to 8 weeks of consistent daily use. Results include improvements in skin texture and glow, increased hair growth, stronger nails, better gut metabolism, and overall wellness.
No, Collagreens does not provide instant results. It works gradually and cumulatively over time. You can stop taking it at any time, but results will fade gradually after stopping.

No, you should not take Collagreens with milk. The fruits and citric acid in the formula can cause milk to separate. Instead, we recommend having curd or milk after taking your daily Collagreens sachet.
Yes, you can take Collagreens with juice. While it is best mixed with normal or cold water, juice is also a suitable option for preparing your daily Collagreens sachet.
Yes, you can take Collagreens before gym or workout sessions. It can be taken at any time of the day, and taking it before exercise is perfectly fine.
Yes, you can take Collagreens after gym or workout sessions. It can be taken at any time of the day, and taking it post-workout is perfectly fine for recovery and nutrition support.
Yes, you can take Collagreens at night. It can be taken at any time of the day, and taking it before bed is perfectly fine as long as you maintain daily consistency.
If you miss a day of Collagreens, simply continue the next day with your regular one sachet. Do not double up or take two sachets to make up for a missed day.
No, only one sachet of Collagreens per day is recommended. Do not take two sachets in a single day as it exceeds the recommended daily usage limit.

Yes, staying well hydrated is important when taking Collagreens. Drinking adequate water throughout the day supports the absorption of collagen peptides and helps the supergreens work effectively in your body.

Yes, you can stop taking Collagreens at any time. It is not addictive, and you can discontinue use whenever you choose. However, results will gradually fade after you stop taking it.

No visible skin or hair effects are expected in 6 days, only changes in gut metabolism and waste elimination may be noticed. For visible results, a 30-day or 60-day pack is recommended.

It is recommended to take Collagreens in normal or cold water for the best tasting experience. It can also be taken in lukewarm water. Avoid using boiling or very hot water, as heat breaks down and degrades the collagen peptides, reducing effectiveness.

Supergreens are included in Collagreens to cover daily nutrient gaps and because greens naturally help build collagen in the body. The combination of marine collagen plus supergreens creates a complete wellness approach.

Moringa in Collagreens is rich in Vitamin A and antioxidants, which support skin health, immunity, and overall wellness. It is one of the key supergreens that contributes to the product's nutritional profile.
Spirulina is a nutrient-dense blue-green algae superfood rich in protein, vitamins, and minerals. In Collagreens, it provides essential nutrients that support energy, immunity, and overall health.
Chlorella is a green algae superfood that supports detoxification and boosts immunity. In Collagreens, it helps the body eliminate toxins and strengthens the immune system naturally.

Amla is one of the richest natural sources of Vitamin C, which is essential for collagen synthesis. Vitamin C acts as a mandatory co-factor for the enzymes that build and stabilise collagen fibres in the body.
Beetroot is included in Collagreens because it supports blood health and circulation. It provides natural nitrates and antioxidants that help maintain healthy blood flow and cardiovascular wellness.
Ginger is included in Collagreens because it supports digestion and gut comfort. It helps soothe the digestive system, reduce nausea, and promote better gut health naturally.

Curcumin from turmeric is included in Collagreens because it provides powerful anti-inflammatory benefits and protects collagen from free radical damage. It supports joint health and overall wellness.

Natural fruits are added to Collagreens for taste and antioxidants. Blueberry, pomegranate, apple, and pineapple contribute to the pleasant flavour while providing natural antioxidants that support overall health.

If your order is cancelled before it is shipped, you will receive a cancellation confirmation on email. Refunds will be processed into your source account within 5 to 7 business days of initiating the refund process.
If you receive a tampered, damaged, or opened package upon delivery, do not accept it. Simply deny acceptance and contact Yuvaya at hello@yuvaya.in with evidence and your Order ID.

Replacements are processed after verification for damaged delivery, expired products, or foreign contamination. Please provide evidence in the form of images or videos along with your Order ID or Invoice details to hello@yuvaya.in.

For partial orders, Yuvaya will replace the part of the order that was not delivered. Please reach out to hello@yuvaya.in within 24 hours of receiving your order with evidence in the form of images and videos along with your Order ID or Invoice details.
For partial orders, you also have the option to get the balance amount credited as store credit into your account instead of a replacement for the missing items.

For mismatched orders, Yuvaya will replace the part of the order that was delivered incorrectly. Please email hello@yuvaya.in within 24 hours of receiving your order with evidence and your Order ID or Invoice details.
For mismatched orders, you also have the option to get the balance amount credited as store credit into your account once the mismatched products are picked up.

For marketplace orders through Amazon or Nature's Basket, please raise a service request directly with the marketplace for replacement or refund as per their guidelines. If they cannot resolve the issue, contact hello@yuvaya.in within 48 hours of placing the order.

For genuine product concerns verified by the customer support team through your inquiry at hello@yuvaya.in, a replacement for the same product can be provided. Unfortunately, replacement with another product is not possible.

In the extremely rare case of foreign contamination, please write to hello@yuvaya.in within 24 hours of receiving the order for a satisfactory resolution. This is a one-off event that is extremely uncommon.

For any questions, order issues, or product enquiries, contact Yuvaya's customer support team at hello@yuvaya.in. The support team is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST, and aims to respond within 24 to 48 hours. You can also manage your orders through the My Orders section on yuvaya.in.
